item.title: Hugo部署记录
item.description: 下载Hugo 下载地址 版本：v0.70.0 平台：win10 下载后解压是一个应用程序无需安装(不愧是go)，选好放置目录添加到环境变量 验证是否安装成功：hugo version 创建网站 使用命令：hugo new site [name]，生成根目录，目录结构如下： ├─archetypes ├─content ├─data ├─layouts ├─static ├─themes └─config.toml 选择主题 主题网站 选择一个如mixedpaper下载到themes目录下：git clone https://themes.gohugo.io/mixedpaper/ themes/mixedpaper 创建一篇文章 使用命令：hugo new post/test.md，生成在content目录下 文件默认内容如下 title: "test" date: 2020-05-13T13:11:31+08:00 draft: true 其中draft表示是否草稿文件，编辑完将其改为 false，否则编译时会跳过 测试 使用命令：hugo server --theme=mixedpaper --buildDrafts buildDrafts表示包括草稿 浏览器打开 http://localhost:1313查看页面 修改配置文件 修改config.toml，如下示例，具体配置要看对应主题的参数要求 baseURL = "https://miluo-cc.github.io/" languageCode = "zh-CN" title = "miluo" theme = "mixedpaper" author = "miluo" copyright = "&copy; 2020. All rights reserved." 部署到github 使用命令：hugo --baseUrl="https://miluo-cc.github.io" 项目根目录多出public文件夹，里面是整个网站

item.title: About
item.description: Written in Go, Hugo is an open source static site generator available under the Apache License 2.0. Hugo supports TOML, YAML, and JSON data file types, Markdown and HTML content files and uses shortcodes to add rich content. Other notable features are taxonomies, multilingual mode, image processing, custom output formats, HTML/CSS/JS minification and support for Sass SCSS workflows. Hugo makes use of a variety of open source projects including: Blackfriday Chroma Smartcrop Cobra Viper Hugo is ideal for blogs, corporate websites, creative portfolios, online magazines, single page applications or even a website with thousands of pages. Hugo is for people who want to hand code their own website without worrying about setting up complicated runtimes, dependencies and databases.
